expectations.evidence: Lists all 9 on-colour tokens: High, Medium-Text, Low-Text, Medium-Stroke, Low-Stroke, Accent, Accent-A11y, Hover, Pressed plus the surface fill = 10 tokens per role
Clearly states 'bg-subtle uses the on-subtle on-colour context' and shows comparison table of on-subtle vs on-default parameters
Explains stroke offset +10 vs +8, asymmetric Accent-A11y computation, BG-Subtle fill remapping to state-layer tint, no bold inversion
Uses correct naming: --Primary-BG-Subtle-High, --Primary-BG-Subtle-Medium-Text, etc. Full token list provided in correct format
